title: PolicyEvaluationRequest
description: A policy simulation request. Identity is canonicalized from authentication and attributes may add restrictive observations but cannot assert approvals or deterministic evidence.
$comment: approval_status, approved, approval tokens, tenant identity, and deterministic-evidence flags in attributes are not authorization facts.

subject.description: Informational caller assertion; the API substitutes the authenticated principal.

attributes.description: Untrusted observations. Only a server-built verified context is evaluated by authorization policy.
